inputs.label: Solute Weight
inputs.businessContext: Mass of solute used in the solution, measured in grams.

inputs.label: Molecular Weight
inputs.businessContext: Molecular weight of the solute substance, in grams per mole.

inputs.label: Valency (n-factor)
inputs.businessContext: Number of reactive units (equivalents) per mole; for acids, it is the number of H⁺ ions; for bases, OH⁻ ions; for redox reactions, electrons transferred.

inputs.label: Solution Volume
inputs.businessContext: Total volume of the prepared solution, in liters.

formulas: const eqWt = molecularWeight / valency; const normality = weight / (eqWt * volume); return { primary: normality, breakdown: [eqWt, normality] };
